overrides.expect: = \boxed \frac {m}{\pi \hbar^ {2} k} \frac {| 1 + \frac {m \alpha}{\hbar^ {2} k} \left[ \frac {1}{k a} - \cot (k a) \right] |}{\sqrt {1 - \frac {2 m \alpha}{\hbar^ {2} k} \cot (k a) - \left(\frac {m \alpha}{\hbar^ {2} k}\right) ^ {2}}}.
overrides.new: = \boxed{\frac {m}{\pi \hbar^ {2} k} \frac {| 1 + \frac {m \alpha}{\hbar^ {2} k} \left[ \frac {1}{k a} - \cot (k a) \right] |}{\sqrt {1 - \frac {2 m \alpha}{\hbar^ {2} k} \cot (k a) - \left(\frac {m \alpha}{\hbar^ {2} k}\right) ^ {2}}}}.

\left. \begin{array}{l} \text {Continuity of u at} r = a: A \sin (k a) = D e ^ {- \kappa a} \\ \text {Continuity of u ^ {\prime} at} r = a: A k \cos (k a) = - D \kappa e ^ {- \kappa a} \end{array} \right\} \text {divide:} \frac {1}{k} \tan (k a) = - \frac {1}{\kappa}, \text {or} - \cot k a = \frac {\kappa}{k}.

overrides.expect: \dot {c} _ {N} = - \frac {i}{\hbar} H _ {N N} ^ {\prime}, \quad \text {or} \quad \boxed {c _ {N} (t) = 1 - \frac {i}{\hbar} \int_ {0} ^ {t} H _ {N N} ^ {\prime} (t ^ {\prime}) d t ^ {\prime}, \text {whereas for m\neq N :}}
(e ^ {i \mathsf {H}}) ^ {\dagger} (e ^ {i \mathsf {H}}) = e ^ {- i \mathsf {H}} e ^ {i \mathsf {H}} = e ^ {i (\mathsf {H} - \mathsf {H})} = \mathsf {I}, \text {using (c). So e^{iH} is unitary.}

\langle n ^ {\prime} \ell^ {\prime} m ^ {\prime} | \mathbf {V} | n \ell m \rangle = \left\{ \begin{array}{c} \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} C _ {m - 1} ^ {\ell} _ {m ^ {\prime}} ^ {1} _ {\ell^ {\prime}} - \frac {1}{\sqrt {2}} C _ {m} ^ {\ell} _ {0} ^ {1} _ {m ^ {\prime}} ^ {\ell^ {\prime}} \\ \frac {i}{\sqrt {2}} C _ {m - 1} ^ {\ell} _ {m ^ {\prime}} ^ {1} _ {\ell^ {\prime}} + \frac {i}{\sqrt {2}} C _ {m} ^ {\ell} _ {1} ^ {1} _ {m ^ {\prime}} ^ {\ell^ {\prime}} \\ C _ {m} ^ {\ell} _ {0} ^ {1} _ {m ^ {\prime}} ^ {\ell^ {\prime}} \end{array} \right\} \langle n ^ {\prime} \ell^ {\prime} | | V | | n \ell \rangle = \mathbf {M} \langle n ^ {\prime} \ell^ {\prime} | | V | | n \ell \rangle ,
overrides.new: \langle n^{\prime} \ell^{\prime} m^{\prime} | \mathbf{V} | n \ell m \rangle = \left\{ \begin{array}{c} \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} C_{m-1,m^{\prime}}^{\ell,1,\ell^{\prime}} - \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} C_{m,0,m^{\prime}}^{\ell,1,\ell^{\prime}} \\ \frac{i}{\sqrt{2}} C_{m-1,m^{\prime}}^{\ell,1,\ell^{\prime}} + \frac{i}{\sqrt{2}} C_{m,1,m^{\prime}}^{\ell,1,\ell^{\prime}} \\ C_{m,0,m^{\prime}}^{\ell,1,\ell^{\prime}} \end{array} \right\} \langle n^{\prime} \ell^{\prime} || V || n \ell \rangle = \mathbf{M} \langle n^{\prime} \ell^{\prime} || V || n \ell \rangle ,

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} E _ {0} ^ {2} = \sum_ {n = 1} ^ {\infty} \frac {| \langle \psi_ {n} | H ^ {\prime} | \psi_ {0} \rangle | ^ {2}}{E _ {0} - E _ {n}}. \quad \text {Here} \quad | \psi_ {0} \rangle = | 0 \rangle | 0 \rangle , \quad | \psi_ {n} \rangle = | n _ {1} \rangle | n _ {2} \rangle , \quad \text {so} \\ = \left(\frac {e ^ {2}}{2 \pi \epsilon_ {0} R ^ {3}}\right) ^ {2} \sum_ {n _ {1} = 1} ^ {\infty} \sum_ {n _ {2} = 1} ^ {\infty} \frac {| \langle n _ {1} | x _ {1} | 0 \rangle | ^ {2} | \langle n _ {2} | x _ {2} | 0 \rangle | ^ {2}}{E _ {0 , 0} - E _ {n _ {1} , n _ {2}}} [ \text {use Problem 3.39} ] \\ = \left(\frac {e ^ {2}}{2 \pi \epsilon_ {0} R ^ {3}}\right) ^ {2} \frac {| \langle 1 | x | 0 \rangle | ^ {2} | \langle 1 | x | 0 \rangle | ^ {2}}{\left(\frac {1}{2} \hbar \omega_ {0} + \frac {1}{2} \hbar \omega_ {0}\right) - \left(\frac {3}{2} \hbar \omega_ {0} + \frac {3}{2} \hbar \omega_ {0}\right)} [ \text {zero unless n_{1} = n_{2} = 1} ] \\ = \left(\frac {e ^ {2}}{2 \pi \epsilon_ {0} R ^ {3}}\right) ^ {2} \left(- \frac {1}{2 \hbar \omega_ {0}}\right) \left(\frac {\hbar}{2 m \omega_ {0}}\right) ^ {2} = - \frac {\hbar}{8 m ^ {2} \omega_ {0} ^ {3}} \left(\frac {e ^ {2}}{2 \pi \epsilon_ {0}}\right) ^ {2} \frac {1}{R ^ {6}}. \quad \checkmark \\ \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} E_{0}^{2} = \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{| \langle \psi_{n} | H^{\prime} | \psi_{0} \rangle |^{2}}{E_{0} - E_{n}}. \quad \text{Here} \quad | \psi_{0} \rangle = | 0 \rangle | 0 \rangle , \quad | \psi_{n} \rangle = | n_{1} \rangle | n_{2} \rangle , \quad \text{so} \\ = \left(\frac{e^{2}}{2 \pi \epsilon_{0} R^{3}}\right)^{2} \sum_{n_{1}=1}^{\infty} \sum_{n_{2}=1}^{\infty} \frac{| \langle n_{1} | x_{1} | 0 \rangle |^{2} | \langle n_{2} | x_{2} | 0 \rangle |^{2}}{E_{0,0} - E_{n_{1},n_{2}}} [ \text{use Problem 3.39} ] \\ = \left(\frac{e^{2}}{2 \pi \epsilon_{0} R^{3}}\right)^{2} \frac{| \langle 1 | x | 0 \rangle |^{2} | \langle 1 | x | 0 \rangle |^{2}}{\left(\frac{1}{2} \hbar \omega_{0} + \frac{1}{2} \hbar \omega_{0}\right) - \left(\frac{3}{2} \hbar \omega_{0} + \frac{3}{2} \hbar \omega_{0}\right)} [ \text{zero unless } n_{1} = n_{2} = 1 ] \\ = \left(\frac{e^{2}}{2 \pi \epsilon_{0} R^{3}}\right)^{2} \left(- \frac{1}{2 \hbar \omega_{0}}\right) \left(\frac{\hbar}{2 m \omega_{0}}\right)^{2} = - \frac{\hbar}{8 m^{2} \omega_{0}^{3}} \left(\frac{e^{2}}{2 \pi \epsilon_{0}}\right)^{2} \frac{1}{R^{6}}. \quad \checkmark \\ \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} c _ {n} = \frac {\sqrt {2}}{a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \sin \left(\frac {\pi}{a} x\right) \sin \left(\frac {n \pi}{2 a} x\right) d x = \frac {\sqrt {2}}{2 a} \int_ {0} ^ {a} \left\{\cos \left[ \left(\frac {n}{2} - 1\right) \frac {\pi x}{a} \right] - \cos \left[ \left(\frac {n}{2} + 1\right) \frac {\pi x}{a} \right] \right\} d x \\ = \frac {1}{\sqrt {2} a} \left. \left\{\frac {\sin \left[ \left(\frac {n}{2} - 1\right) \frac {\pi x}{a} \right]}{\left(\frac {n}{2} - 1\right) \frac {\pi}{a}} - \frac {\sin \left[ \left(\frac {n}{2} + 1\right) \frac {\pi x}{a} \right]}{\left(\frac {n}{2} + 1\right) \frac {\pi}{a}} \right\} \right| _ {0} ^ {a} \quad (\text {for n\neq 2}) \\ = \frac {1}{\sqrt {2} \pi} \left\{\frac {\sin [ (\frac {n}{2} - 1) \pi ]}{(\frac {n}{2} - 1)} - \frac {\sin [ (\frac {n}{2} + 1) \pi ]}{(\frac {n}{2} + 1)} \right\} = \frac {\sin [ (\frac {n}{2} + 1) \pi ]}{\sqrt {2} \pi} \left[ \frac {1}{(\frac {n}{2} - 1)} - \frac {1}{(\frac {n}{2} + 1)} \right] \\ = \frac {4 \sqrt {2}}{\pi} \frac {\sin \left[ \left(\frac {n}{2} + 1\right) \pi \right]}{(n ^ {2} - 4)} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0, & \text {if n is even} \\ \pm \frac {4 \sqrt {2}}{\pi (n ^ {2} - 4)}, & \text {if n is odd} \end{array} \right.. \\ \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} c_{n} = \frac{\sqrt{2}}{a} \int_{0}^{a} \sin \left(\frac{\pi}{a} x\right) \sin \left(\frac{n \pi}{2 a} x\right) d x = \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2 a} \int_{0}^{a} \left\{\cos \left[ \left(\frac{n}{2} - 1\right) \frac{\pi x}{a} \right] - \cos \left[ \left(\frac{n}{2} + 1\right) \frac{\pi x}{a} \right] \right\} d x \\ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2} a} \left. \left\{\frac{\sin \left[ \left(\frac{n}{2} - 1\right) \frac{\pi x}{a} \right]}{\left(\frac{n}{2} - 1\right) \frac{\pi}{a}} - \frac{\sin \left[ \left(\frac{n}{2} + 1\right) \frac{\pi x}{a} \right]}{\left(\frac{n}{2} + 1\right) \frac{\pi}{a}} \right\} \right|_{0}^{a} \quad (\text{for } n\neq 2) \\ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2} \pi} \left\{\frac{\sin [ (\frac{n}{2} - 1) \pi ]}{(\frac{n}{2} - 1)} - \frac{\sin [ (\frac{n}{2} + 1) \pi ]}{(\frac{n}{2} + 1)} \right\} = \frac{\sin [ (\frac{n}{2} + 1) \pi ]}{\sqrt{2} \pi} \left[ \frac{1}{(\frac{n}{2} - 1)} - \frac{1}{(\frac{n}{2} + 1)} \right] \\ = \frac{4 \sqrt{2}}{\pi} \frac{\sin \left[ \left(\frac{n}{2} + 1\right) \pi \right]}{(n^{2} - 4)} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0, & \text{if n is even} \\ \pm \frac{4 \sqrt{2}}{\pi (n^{2} - 4)}, & \text{if n is odd} \end{array} \right.. \\ \end{array}
